report.summary: Community growth cycle v11 (Mar 17): DeFi Infrastructure Week content push — 4 new guide launches spotlighted (Aerodrome Finance ve(3,3) deep dive, cross-chain bridges safety guide, cross-chain interoperability thread, DAO governance voting guide); full posting schedule Tue–Sun drafted around FOMC Day (Mar 18); Thursday newsletter updated with new guide additions; social card created (Cross-Chain World map + Aerodrome flywheel dual-panel); publish queue confirmed EMPTY, 390+ pages live.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Tue Mar 17, 10am): Aerodrome Finance guide — ve(3,3) flywheel explained (stake → veAERO → gauge votes → emissions → deeper liquidity → more stakers); $1.4B+ TVL, Base #1 DEX; CTA to /learn/aerodrome-finance-guide

Tweet (Tue Mar 17, 12pm): Cross-chain bridges safety guide — $2.5B+ hack losses (Ronin $625M, Wormhole $320M, Nomad $190M); protocol comparison (liquidity networks vs message-passing vs ZK-based); CTA to /learn/cross-chain-bridges-guide

Twitter Thread (Tue Mar 17, 4pm, 5 posts): Cross-chain interoperability 2026 — why one chain never won; LayerZero V2, Wormhole, Axelar, CCIP compared; intent-based bridging meta (Across, UniswapX); EIP-7702 + Superchain convergence angle; CTA to /learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026

Tweet (Tue Mar 17, 4pm): DAO governance voting guide — <5% participation problem; delegate voting, optimistic governance, conviction voting explained; how to vote $UNI/$ARB/$COMP; CTA to /learn/dao-governance-voting-guide-2026
Discord/Telegram (Tue Mar 17, 2pm): 4 new DeFi infrastructure guides drop announcement (Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges, cross-chain interop, DAO governance); '390+ pages live, queue empty' note
Wed Mar 18 FOMC Day: Pre-decision tweet 8am, 30-min countdown 1:30pm, post-decision scenario tweets (hawkish/dovish templates from v9); all carry forward unchanged

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): Add 3 new guide spotlights (Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges, DAO governance) to existing v10 base newsletter; update market pulse with FOMC outcome; update countdowns to Pectra T-23 and Tax T-28

Twitter/Discord Poll (Thu-Fri): DEX model battle — Uniswap V4 hooks vs Aerodrome ve(3,3) vs Intent-based (UniswapX) vs Order book (Hyperliquid) — drives community engagement and Sprint 59 content signal
Sat Mar 21: Base ecosystem weekend post — Base $15B+ TVL, Aerodrome, Morpho, USDC native, Coinbase distribution angle
Sun Mar 22: Week in review — FOMC outcome + BTC reaction summary, 390+ pages, Pectra T-23 countdown; CTA to /tools/fear-greed-timeline

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-defi-infrastructure-week.svg — 1200x630 dual-panel social card: LEFT panel 'Cross-Chain World' showing 5 chain nodes (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Solana, BNB Chain) connected by protocol-labeled bridge lines (LayerZero, Wormhole, Axelar) with $2.5B hack warning bar; RIGHT panel 'Aerodrome ve(3,3) Flywheel' with 4-step circular diagram (Stake $AERO → Vote Gauges → Deep Liquidity → More Stakers) in brand colors; bottom bar with 4 new guide pills (Cross-Chain Bridges, Cross-Chain Interop, Aerodrome Finance, DAO Governance) + degen0x.com branding + '390+ pages live' badge. Saved to /public/social-defi-infrastructure-week.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: 390+ published pages live (FOMC guide, Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges, cross-chain interop, DAO governance all promoted this cycle). Publish queue is now EMPTY — all queued content live.
FOMC decision is TOMORROW Mar 18 at 2pm ET. Rate hold 100% priced in (CME FedWatch). Dot plot is the key signal. BTC consolidating at $75K+ ahead of decision.
ETF inflow streak: 6 consecutive days / $962.8M since Mar 9. Strategy Inc. holds 738,731 BTC. Macro structure materially different from 2022.
Content velocity this week: 4 DeFi infrastructure guides (Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges/interop, DAO governance) + telegram trading bots + Virtuals Protocol + FOMC guide. 50K+ words published.
Key upcoming catalysts: Pectra T-24 (Apr 10, EIP-7702), US crypto tax deadline T-29 (Apr 15), Powell penultimate FOMC meeting.
Cross-chain bridge guide has high shareability due to $2.5B hack angle — designed to drive organic backlinks from crypto security content aggregators.
Posting schedule: Tue DeFi guide launches (4 tweets + Discord) → Wed FOMC Day live pack → Thu newsletter + DEX poll → Sat Base ecosystem → Sun week review + Pectra countdown.
